$comment: A3 decision = DEFAULT_APPLIED. Real trace from Phase 1: user asked 'what is the engagement rate'. Only time scope was missing; registry defaulted to last_28_days. Engagement rate term mapped deterministically (1-to-1 catalog match) so no clarification needed. Validates against ../agents/a3-decision.schema.json.

applied_defaults.rationale: no time scope specified; GA4 28-day window is conventional for rate metrics

disclosures: Showing last 28 days (no time range specified).
Period rate computed as sum(engagedSessions) / sum(sessions) over complete days only — today (partial) excluded from the rate.
